name: Reading School Bus
registry_source: NC Secretary of State (sosnc.gov) - no matching record located via public search
notes: No FMCSA/SAFER carrier record found via SAFER keyword search for 'READING SCHOOL BUS', 'READING SCHOOL', 'READING BUS' in NC. The only similarly-named carrier (READING BUS LINE INC USDOT 372787) is located at 19771 McCall Ave, Reading, MN - a clear mismatch on state/address. No NC SoS or Bizapedia hits for 'Reading School Bus' at 120 Willow Run Dr, Forest City NC 28043. Likely a small/personal intrastate school bus operator (possibly DBA of an individual) serving Rutherford County Schools; may not be registered with FMCSA (NC intrastate school transport is generally exempt). Recommend direct outreach to Rutherford County Schools transportation office to confirm vendor.

name: Gila School Bus Svc LLC
registry_source: NM Secretary of State Business Entity Search (enterprise.sos.nm.gov) - JS-rendered portal; public Google search did not return direct registry page
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record found for 'GILA SCHOOL BUS' or 'GILA BUS' or 'GILA' in keyword searches. Operator confirmed via LinkedIn (Alan Aragon - contractor, Gila School Bus Service LLC, and fire chief) and referenced indirectly in NMPED School Bus Contractor List. Aragon NM (Catron County) is a tiny rural community; this is an intrastate-only school bus contractor serving Reserve/Quemado school routes - likely not subject to FMCSA registration. Could not confirm officers/formation date without authenticated NM SoS access.

name: Martinez Bus Svc Inc
officers: Charles A. Martinez (owner/operator, per NMPED contractor list)
registry_source: NM Secretary of State Business Entity Search (enterprise.sos.nm.gov) - not directly accessible via WebFetch
notes: Only FMCSA match for 'MARTINEZ BUS' (USDOT 2630047) is located in Nogales, AZ - geographic mismatch to Cerro, NM; NOT this carrier. NMPED School Bus Contractor List indicates Charles A. Martinez operates a school bus service at PO Box 234, Cerro NM 87519 (phone 575-779-5665), serving Questa Independent Schools. This is an intrastate-only home-to-school operator typically exempt from FMCSA registration. NM SoS portal could not be accessed via WebFetch (JS-rendered) to confirm inc_date and entity_status.

name: Suazo Bus Svc Inc
registry_source: Manta.com business directory (third-party); NM SoS portal not directly fetchable. Establishment year 1995 per Manta - treat as approximate; not an authoritative state filing date.
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record found for 'SUAZO BUS' or 'SUAZO'. Manta.com lists Suazo Bus in Abiquiu NM 87510, established 1995, ~$150K annual revenue, ~1 employee, categorized as School Bus Transportation Service. Phones 505-685-4339 / 505-470-0764. Operates school bus routes for Espanola Public Schools (Abiquiu Elementary - Barranco, Pueblo de Abiquiu, Carrera, Tierra Azul). Intrastate home-to-school operator typically exempt from FMCSA. Inc_date 1995 should be confirmed via NM SoS direct lookup.

name: Bristol School Trnsprtn Co Inc
registry_source: RI Department of State Business Services (business.sos.ri.gov) - portal requires interactive search; not directly fetchable
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record found for 'BRISTOL SCHOOL TRANSPORTATION', 'BRISTOL SCHOOL', or 'BRISTOL' (keyword search) in any state. A separate BRISTOL TRANSPORTATION SERVICES LLC (USDOT 4213901) exists but the only Bristol Transportation hit in SAFER keyword search was located in Cleveland, OH - not a match. The Bristol-Warren Regional School District (a public entity, not Bristol School Transportation Co Inc) operates the area's school transport. Bristol Borough School District (USDOT 1861412) is a Pennsylvania match - not RI. Likely a historic/dormant private contractor at 572 Main St, Warren RI 02885; possibly dissolved or operating without FMCSA registration as intrastate. RI SoS portal could not be accessed via WebFetch.
